basic_details.job_title: MPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 – 148 Posts, Online Form Open Till 26 June 2026
basic_details.short_information: Candidates must note the revised schedule carefully, as the original application start date (10 May 2026) has been updated through the official corrigendum dated 07 May 2026. Note: The application dates for subjects other than the six listed above will be announced separately by MPPSC.

application_fee.details: MPPSC has prescribed a category-wise application fee for this recruitment. Payment must be made through online mode only.

qualification.details: Understanding the eligibility requirements before applying is essential to avoid rejection. MPPSC has prescribed educational and academic qualifications for the Assistant Professor role in line with UGC norms. | Candidates must hold a Postgraduate (PG) Degree in the relevant subject along with any one of the following: | Ph.D. in the concerned discipline, OR NET (National Eligibility Test) qualified, OR SLET / SET (State Level Eligibility Test) qualified | Minimum Age: 21 Years Maximum Age: 40 Years Age Calculated As On: 01 January 2026 Age relaxation is applicable as per Madhya Pradesh government rules for SC, ST, OBC, PwD, and other reserved categories.

salary_details.details: The Assistant Professor post under MPPSC carries a competitive pay scale in line with the 7th Pay Commission recommendations for state government employees. | Pay Level: Level-10 Basic Pay: ₹57,700/- per month (plus applicable allowances) | This makes MPPSC Assistant Professor one of the most financially rewarding teaching positions in the MP government college system.

selection_process: MPPSC will select candidates through a multi-stage process to ensure merit-based recruitment.
The selection for MPPSC Assistant Professor 2025 consists of the following stages:

Written Examination – Objective/descriptive based exam on the subject concerned Interview – Personality test and subject knowledge evaluation Medical Examination – Fitness test as per government norms Document Verification – Original certificate verification
Candidates must qualify in each stage to proceed to the next.
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates can submit their applications online through the official MPPSC portal. Follow this step-by-step process:
Visit the official website at mppsc.mp.gov.in
Navigate to the "Apply Online" section and find the relevant advertisement number (12/2025 to 18/2025)
Register using a valid email ID and mobile number if you are a new user
Fill in the application form with your personal, academic, and contact details
Upload documents including photograph, signature, educational certificates, and (if applicable) experience certificate / calculation sheet
Pay the application fee through the MP Online portal using net banking, UPI, or debit/credit card
Submit the form and download/save the confirmation receipt for future reference
The correction/edit facility is available from 30 May to 28 June 2026 for a correction charge of ₹50/-.

faq.question: Q1. How many total vacancies are there in MPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: MPPSC has announced a total of 148 vacancies for Assistant Professor posts across six subjects: Sanskrit (34), Geography (74), Psychology (10), Law (17), Geology (10), and Yogic Science (3).

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for MPPSC Assistant Professor 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for MPPSC Assistant Professor 2026 is 26 June 2026 at 11:59 PM.

faq.question: Q3. When does the online application window open for MPPSC Assistant Professor 2026?
faq.answer: The online application starts from 25 May 2026, as revised through the official corrigendum dated 07 May 2026. The original start date of 10 May 2026 was changed.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for MPPSC Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: General and other state candidates must pay ₹500/-. SC, ST, OBC, and PwD (Divyang) candidates from Madhya Pradesh pay ₹250/-. An additional MP Online portal charge of ₹40/- is applicable for all.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for MPPSC Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 21 and 40 years of age as on 01 January 2026. Age relaxation is available as per MP government rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q6. What qualifications are required for MPPSC Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Postgraduate degree in the relevant subject plus either a Ph.D., NET, or SLET/SET qualification. This is in line with UGC eligibility norms for college-level teaching posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for MPPSC Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The pay scale is Level-10 with a basic pay of ₹57,700/- per month, along with applicable state government allowances.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for MPPSC Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: Selection is based on four stages: Written Examination, Interview, Medical Examination, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the exam date for MPPSC Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: The written examination is scheduled for 12 July 2026, with admit cards expected to be released on 02 July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Why was a corrigendum issued for MPPSC Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: MPPSC issued a corrigendum on 07 May 2026 to revise the online application start date from 10 May 2026 to 25 May 2026. It also made it mandatory for guest faculty (Atithi Vidwan) working against sanctioned posts in MP government colleges to upload their experience certificate and calculation sheet along with the application.
